_comment: Template for materiality kappa calibration gate (Gate 22). Operator authors 30 entries. Each event_id is a UUID (random); operator_classification is YOUR ground-truth label (1=M-1 / 2=M-2 / 3=M-3); system_classification is what the LLM judge produced (run l4_daily_monitor.materiality_classifier on the same raw_text to populate); system_confidence is the judge's reported confidence at the time. Replace this comment block with the first real event.

raw_text_for_context: Apple announces $110B share buyback authorization, biggest in history
